title: BASE Workspace
description: A `base.workspace.json` declaring several named BASE roots so one CLI/MCP server can route across them and operate inside a selected root (FR-CLI-005). Authored by an operator; loaded by `readWorkspace` (tools/core/roots.mjs). Routing may span the declared roots, but every read/write/execute stays confined to a single selected root.

schema_version.description: Contract version. Defaults to "base.workspace.v1" when omitted.

id.description: Stable workspace id. Defaults to the workspace directory name when omitted.

label.description: Human-readable workspace name. Falls back to `name`, then `id`, then the directory name.

roots.description: The declared BASE roots. Ids must be unique. The selected root is: an explicit --root-id / root_id, else the single root marked `default: true`, else the first declared root.

id.description: Stable, unique root id used by --root-id / the MCP root_id parameter and in qualified agent names ("<root-id>/<agent>").

path.description: Path to the BASE root, resolved relative to the workspace file's directory. May point outside that directory; every file operation is still confined inside the resolved root.

default.description: Marks the implicit default root. At most one root may set this to true.

egress.description: Egress policy of this root (D22): local-only resources never leave toward a remote model provider. Default: any.
